name: Feudal/Sengoku Japan Fantasy RPG
description:
An RPG set in feudal Japan with fantasy elements involved. You're free to do whatever you want and play the role of anyone you wish to be - from a princess, to a vagabond and a common fisherman.

Main inspirations behind the bot: Sekiro (heavy on this one), Ghost of Tsushima/Yotei, Hell's Paradise, Samurai Champloo, Japanese folklore/history, Buddhism/Shintoism obv

03.11.2025 - small update, fixed some stuff. I heavily recommend using Deepseek or any proxy other than JLLM. that's what i was making the bot in mind with.

17.01.2026 - another small (slightly bigger than before tho) update! I kinda didn't expect the bot to blow up so much so i might give it a proper big retouch, adding some more history-accurate stuff, expanding on the supernatural stuff and overall just making it a bit more vibrant. It won't affect any existing chats or the way the bot does stuff, but there are a few things i personally feel are missing still. Big thanks for all the nice comments!
creator: suzygg
